theme_and_archetype.domain: Hybrid Fullstack - Realtime AI Trading Dashboard
theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for 'Control Room' density
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: High-frequency trading and algorithmic bot monitoring require immense data density without cognitive overload. Dark mode prevents eye strain during extended monitor time. Swiss typography rules ensure alignment and readability. The design strips away unnecessary decoration (no heavy gradients or shadows) in favor of 1px borders, rigid grids, and color-coded status indicators (Bloomberg Terminal meets modern Fintech).

typography.headings: Inter (Weights: 600, 700) - Tight tracking for space efficiency.
typography.body: IBM Plex Sans (Weights: 400, 500) - Excellent legibility at 10px-12px sizes.
typography.mono_data: JetBrains Mono (Weights: 400, 500) - MANDATORY for all tickers, PnL numbers, confidence scores, and latencies. Ensures perfect vertical alignment of tabular data.

spacing_and_density.philosophy: Zero wasted pixels. Maximum data per square inch.
spacing_and_density.paddings: Panel containers use p-2 or p-3 (never p-6). Inner elements use p-1.
spacing_and_density.gaps: gap-1 or gap-2 for lists. gap-3 or gap-4 for major panel separations.
spacing_and_density.borders: Rely on 1px solid borders (border-zinc-800) instead of shadows or large padding for separation.
spacing_and_density.radii: rounded-sm (2px) or rounded-md (4px) max. Sharp corners feel more technical and precise.

mockups_and_layouts.name: Pipeline-HUD + Follow-Symbol
mockups_and_layouts.description: A persistent top-bar HUD tracks the macro 5-stage funnel. Below is a 3-column layout. Clicking any ticker globally filters all panels to that specific symbol.

zones.Top Strip (10%): Persistent Pipeline HUD. 5 blocks: [SCAN: 47 Hits] -> [EVAL: 8 Gates] -> [ORDER: 3 Sent] -> [MANAGE: 2 Open] -> [CLOSE: 4 (+2.1R)]. Plus Bot Health (Latency, Model Status).
zones.Left Column (20%): Market Scanner & Alerts. Extremely dense list of tickers with micro sparklines and 1-line text explaining the trigger.
zones.Middle Column (50%): Dynamic Focus Area. If no symbol selected: Shows Morning Briefing. If symbol selected: Shows deep-dive for that ticker (13-layer Confidence Gate radar chart, Live Model Pred, Order Status).
zones.Right Column (30%): Stream of Consciousness & Open Positions. Auto-scrolling feed of bot thoughts (top half). Dense table of Open Positions with inline reasoning (bottom half).

mockups_and_layouts.name: Unified Trade Lifecycle Matrix
mockups_and_layouts.description: A massive, dense data grid akin to an institutional options chain. Everything is visible at a glance without tab switching.

zones.Top Strip (5%): Global PnL, Strategy Phase (SIM/PAPER/LIVE), Active Ticker Count.
zones.Main View (95%): Data Table. Rows = Tickers. Columns = Pipeline Stages. Col 1: Ticker/Setup. Col 2: Scanner Rationale (text snippet). Col 3: Eval 13-layer Gate (horizontal segmented bar graph). Col 4: Order Status (Pending/Filled). Col 5: Position Size/PnL/Bot Manage Rationale. Col 6: Autopsy. Sorting by stage allows seeing bottlenecks instantly.

mockups_and_layouts.name: Decision Timeline Stream
mockups_and_layouts.description: Chronological, event-driven architecture. Treats the bot like a highly communicative employee sending Slack updates, augmented by sidecar data panels.

zones.Left Sidebar (25%): Morning Briefing & Setup Coverage. Static panels showing overnight news, active catalysts, and regime detection.
zones.Center Feed (50%): The 'Brain Stream'. A timeline feed of distinct cards. E.g. A card says 'AAPL: Discovered -> Evaluated (Score 82) -> Executed'. Each card expands in place to reveal the 13-layer gate score and exact CNN/FinBERT reasoning.
zones.Right Sidebar (25%): Active Management. Only shows positions currently open or pending. Mini-charts with inline text: 'Holding NVDA: CNN-LSTM predicts 15m momentum up'.

sections.name: Overnight/Macro Regime
sections.content: 1-sentence AI summary of global market state + Regime indicator (e.g., 'High Volatility Trend').

sections.name: News & Catalysts
sections.content: Dense list of up/downgrades, earnings drops. Uses FinBERT sentiment scores (Green/Red text) inline.

sections.name: In-Play Tickers
sections.content: List of tickers with a 'WHY' pill next to each (e.g., 'TSLA [Unusual Options Vol]', 'AMD [Sympathy Setup]').

sections.name: Game Plan A / B
sections.content: Two distinct colored panels. Plan A (Green border): 'If SPY > 510, target Tech scalps'. Plan B (Amber border): 'If SPY rejects 510, load inverse ETFs'. Bulleted specific triggers.

inline_explanations_design.problem: Raw data without context causes cognitive load.
implementation: No separate tooltip popups (they require hovering and hide data).
Every data row has a primary metric (e.g., AAPL Long $150.23) and directly underneath it, a smaller text-[10px] text-zinc-500 line explaining the WHY.
Example Position Row: Line 1: [NVDA] [+3.2%] [Size: 100]. Line 2: 'Holding: CNN visual identifies bull flag continuation. TFT trailing stop updated to $885.'
Example Scanner Alert: Line 1: [AMD] [Setup: Volatility Breakout]. Line 2: 'Trigger: Unusual options volume + AI Consensus 88%. Map to SIM.'
Use text truncation (truncate) only if strictly necessary, but prefer text wrapping in fixed-width columns to ensure the 'Why' is always readable.

refactor_plan.current_state: SentCom.jsx is 3,614 lines, monolithic, mixing state and UI.
refactor_plan.strategy: Feature-Sliced Design (FSD) mapped to the 5 stages.
new_structure: src/features/Evaluator/ (Stream of Consciousness, 13-layer Confidence Gate viz, Revalidation)
src/features/Execution/ (IB bracket logic, latency health, QuickTrade)
src/features/PositionManager/ (Active holdings, real-time PnL, inline hold/sell rationale)
src/pages/Dashboard/ (The master layout component that orchestrates the features above using a React Context or Zustand store for global 'follow-symbol' state)

testing_requirements.rule: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
